title: Enhanced energy storage performance of confined co-doping dielectric films via nanoparticle self-assembly in ferroelectric phases
abstract: Published online: 22 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-74471-5 The authors present a confined co-doping strategy for polymer-based dielectric films by incorporating BaTiO3 and Al2O3 nanoparticles into the ferroelectric core of coaxial electrospun fibers. The enhanced performance arises from the synergistic effects of high-polarization BaTiO3, wide-bandgap Al2O3, and BaTiO3/Al2O3 heterointerfaces.

title: Anion-exchange fluorinated ion conductors for stable high-voltage <mark>lithium</mark> battery
abstract: Published online: 22 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-74773-8 Conventional fluorination cannot resolve the stability/ion-transport trade-off in solid electrolytes. Here, authors report core-shell Li-fluoride/LiCl nanocomposite precursors to synthesize heavily fluorinated Li-halide and Li-sulfide electrolytes with both high <mark>ionic conductivity</mark> and good oxidative stability.
